patterns.file_watching: icons.rs (lines 99-150) shows the existing pattern: RecommendedWatcher with std::sync::mpsc::channel for sync contexts. For async, we'll use tokio::sync::mpsc and notify-debouncer-mini.
patterns.polling_loop: Both dispatcher.rs (line 348) and merge_gate.rs (line 334) use `tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(poll_ms))` in a loop. Replace with event-driven watcher.
patterns.error_handling: Functions return anyhow::Result<()> and use ? operator for error propagation
patterns.async_runtime: Uses tokio async runtime with tokio::process::Command for spawning processes

existing_implementations.description: notify v6 is already in Cargo.toml. icons.rs has a working file watcher pattern using notify::RecommendedWatcher

key_functions.dispatcher: run_dispatcher() at dispatcher.rs:15 - polls pending/ with tokio::time::sleep
key_functions.merge_gate: run_merge_gate() at merge_gate.rs:13 - polls done/ with tokio::time::sleep
key_functions.icons_watcher: cmd_icons_watch() at icons.rs:100 - reference pattern for notify usage

cli_interface.poll_ms_flag: Both dispatcher and merge-gate have --poll-ms flag (default 500)
cli_interface.fallback_required: Spec requires keeping --poll-ms as fallback when watcher fails
